footer.tagline: Connecting mental health with human technology. Your well-being is our priority.
footer.installInstructions: On Chrome or Edge: open the menu (⋮) and choose «Install Psicólogos en Red» or look for the ⊕ icon in the address bar. On iPhone/iPad: Safari → Share (□↑) → «Add to Home Screen».
footer.installNote: The install option only appears on https:// or localhost, and when the site has icons configured.

home.heroSubtitle: Discover a safe space to explore, heal, and grow with expert mental health professionals.
home.servicesSubtitle: We offer a wide range of therapeutic services tailored to your specific needs.
home.serviceOnlineText: Professional, safe, and confidential support for anxiety, depression, stress, and other emotional challenges—with the flexibility you need.
home.serviceAcademyText: Online courses and diploma programs for psychologists and students, strengthening skills with an updated ethical focus.
home.serviceParentingText: Parenting guidance with psychologists: a safe space, practical tools, family bonds, and real conscious support.
home.aboutP1: Psicólogos en Red was founded in 2020 to offer quality emotional support at a distance. We believe emotional well-being is a fundamental right: that's why we remove geographic barriers with technology and create safe spaces where confidentiality and respect are pillars of every intervention.
home.aboutP2: Our methodology integrates scientific evidence with personalized therapy and continuing education for professionals. We are committed to a positive impact on collective mental health, building a community where empathy and innovation transform lives in a real and lasting way.
home.testimonialsDesc: Real stories from people who have transformed their lives.
home.faqDesc: We answer your most common questions.
home.ctaSubtitle: Take the first step toward your emotional well-being. Book a consultation today.

q1.question: How do I choose the right therapist for me?
q1.answer: When you register, you can view our specialists' profiles, focus areas, and years of experience to choose the one that best fits your needs.

q2.question: Are video sessions private?
q2.answer: Absolutely. We use a secure video platform (Daily) with private rooms per session, so no one else can access your session.

q3.question: What do I need for my first consultation?
q3.answer: You only need a device with camera and microphone (computer or phone) and a stable internet connection. We recommend a quiet, private place.

q4.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q4.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and bank transfers. Payment is made securely before starting the session.

modal.welcomeQuestion: Are you new or already familiar with our services?
modal.welcomeSub: Choose the option that best describes you
modal.serviceQuestion: What service are you looking for?
modal.minorsMessage: We're glad you're interested in your emotional well-being. Please ask your parent(s) or guardian(s) to contact us at:
modal.resultTitle: We'll connect you with the best therapists for you
modal.resultMessage: Based on your answers, we recommend specialists in the approach that best fits what you're looking for.
modal.returningMessage: We're still here to support you. Where would you like to go?

survey.q1: Which area of your life would you prefer to focus on initially?
survey.q1a: My current thoughts and how to change my daily behaviors.
survey.q1b: Understanding the origin of my conflicts and how my past influences my present.
survey.q1c: My current relationships and how I interact with my environment (family, partner, work).
survey.q1d: My personal growth, values, and the meaning I give my life.
survey.q2: If you had to choose a session "style," which would make you most comfortable?
survey.q2a: Structured: with clear goals, weekly tasks, and practical exercises.
survey.q2b: Exploratory: talking freely about whatever comes to mind to discover hidden meanings.
survey.q2c: Dynamic: analyzing the roles I play in my family or social groups.
survey.q2d: Empathetic and reflective: a space of total acceptance to explore my feelings.
survey.q3: Which of these phrases best describes what you expect from your therapist?
survey.q3a: "I hope they give me concrete tools to manage my symptoms (insomnia, stress, phobias)."
survey.q3b: "I hope they help me deepen my unconscious processes and traumas."
survey.q3c: "I hope they help me improve communication and boundaries with the people around me."
survey.q3d: "I hope they accompany me in my self-discovery and personal fulfillment process."
survey.q4: How do you envision the duration and focus of the process?
survey.q4a: Brief and focused on resolving a specific problem as soon as possible.
survey.q4b: Long-term, seeking deep change in my personality structure.
survey.q4c: Variable, focused on changing the dynamics of my current relationships.
survey.q4d: Focused on the "here and now," without a rigidly predetermined duration.
survey.q5: Facing a difficult situation, what do you primarily seek to understand?
survey.q5a: What automatic thoughts are hurting me.
survey.q5b: What childhood pattern I'm repeating without realizing it.
survey.q5c: How I'm influencing others and how they influence me.
survey.q5d: Who I really am in this situation and what I want to decide.

nosotros.title: About us
nosotros.intro: Psychologists Network connects people with mental health professionals in Mexico through secure, ethical, and accessible online care.
nosotros.mission1: We believe mental health care should be accessible, human, and professional. Our mission is to bring quality therapy to anyone who needs it, wherever they are.
nosotros.mission2: We work with certified psychologists, secure payment processes, and technology that protects your privacy in every session.

academia.title: Virtual Academy
academia.welcomeP1: We specialize in giving psychologists the most up-to-date tools and knowledge in mental health. We understand how important continuing education is for professionals who want to stay at the forefront of a dynamic, evolving field.
academia.welcomeP2: Our courses and diploma programs are designed to offer a comprehensive, practical, and meaningful learning experience that strengthens clinical practice and fosters professional and personal growth.
academia.directorQuote: We understand that today's clinical practice demands excellent training. That is why the Psicólogos en Red Virtual Academy was created to bridge the gap between the classroom and the consulting room, offering psychologists and students online specialization programs. Our goal is to provide practical tools that professionalize clinical work and raise mental health standards.
academia.coordinatorQuote: My commitment is to ensure that every program in our Academy meets educational quality standards. As a trainer certified by SEP/CONOCER, I oversee that our academic offerings not only convey knowledge but develop real competencies in our students. My goal is for every certificate to reflect excellence and carry the curricular backing your professional path deserves.

excellence.title: Academic Excellence
excellence.text: Up-to-date content based on scientific evidence for real clinical practice.

flexibility.title: Total Flexibility
flexibility.text: Learn at your own pace with 24/7 access to our virtual platform.

human.title: Human Approach
human.text: We are not just videos; we foster the personal growth of those who care for mental health.

certificate.title: Curricular Backing
certificate.text: Receive a certificate with curricular value backed by a trainer certified by SEP/CONOCER. We guarantee training aligned with official standards to boost your professional path.

academia.empty: No programs available at the moment.
academia.dbUnavailable: Could not load programs. Set DATABASE_URL in .env and restart the dev server.
